title: obione codonocarpa
intro: Obione codonocarpa, also known as Beach Heliotrope, is a small shrub native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Obione codonocarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
